# Copilot Workspace Instructions

Follow the project style guide in [style.md](../style.md) for all future changes.

Key requirements for this workspace:

- Preserve the retro terminal / arcade interface already present in the portfolio.
- Keep the visual language dark, high-contrast, and monospace-driven.
- Prefer Windows-friendly terminal commands when giving the user instructions.
- Avoid generic portfolio redesigns unless the user explicitly asks for one.
- Keep code changes small, readable, and consistent with the current single-file setup unless a refactor is clearly warranted.
- When adding UI, make it feel like a system panel, mission board, inventory item, HUD module, or console output.
